title: Must See | Amazing Lake View | Biggest Plot
description:
Must See | Direct Lake View | Quiet Road | One of the Largest Plots in Jumeirah Park

AED 15,950,000 | 4 Bedrooms | 5 Bathrooms | 9,760 sqft | Jumeirah Park, Dubai

Rare and Highly

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a premium 4-bedroom villa boasting a highly desirable direct lake view and situated on one of the largest plots (9,760 sqft) in its actual location. While the listing is erroneously categorized under the ultra-luxury 'Emirates Hills' area, the description confirms it is located in 'Jumeirah Park'. Jumeirah Park is an established, high-end family community, where properties with direct lake views and oversized plots command a healthy premium due to scarcity.
risk_flags: Critical Location Mismatch: The property is categorized under 'Emirates Hills' but is actually located in 'Jumeirah Park'. This distorts the market median comparison (AED 2,936/sqft for Emirates Hills vs. typically lower rates in Jumeirah Park).

Area Metric Confusion: The 9,760 sqft figure likely represents the plot size, not the Built-Up Area (BUA). Standard 4-bedroom villas in Jumeirah Park typically have a BUA of 3,500 to 4,300 sqft. If BUA is used, the actual price per sqft is significantly higher than the stated AED 1,634.

Overpricing Risk: At AED 15,950,000, this is at the absolute ceiling for Jumeirah Park 4-bedroom villas, even with a large plot and lake view. The investment yield (ROI) will be compressed compared to standard Jumeirah Park assets.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: From an investment perspective, this listing presents a high-risk profile due to misleading data. It is marketed using Emirates Hills' premium market metrics to make a Jumeirah Park property look heavily discounted (AED 1,634/sqft vs AED 2,936/sqft median). In reality, AED 15.95M is an ultra-premium price for Jumeirah Park. While the massive plot and direct lake view offer genuine lifestyle value and scarcity, an investor should value this asset strictly against Jumeirah Park historical transactions. Expect lower rental yields due to the high capital entry point, making this more of an end-user trophy home than a high-yielding investment.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in District 14 of Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC), this 1-bedroom apartment offers an exceptionally large layout of 1,010 sqft, which is significantly larger than the modern JVC 1-bed average of 700-800 sqft. The advertised price of AED 782 per sqft represents a massive 43% discount compared to the current market median of AED 1,371 per sqft. This footprint and pricing structure typically indicate an older, established building where unit sizes were generous but finishes and amenities may be dated compared to newer, premium developments in the community.
risk_flags: High probability of a 'bait-and-switch' or ghost listing, as a 43% discount to the market median is highly anomalous and frequently used by brokers for lead generation.
Potential for high annual service charges calculated on a per-square-foot basis, which could severely compress net rental yields on a 1,010 sqft unit.
Likely older building quality with potential risks of deferred maintenance, poor property management, or active building-wide MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) issues.
High-pressure sales tactics in the description ('First Comes First Reserved') often signal a push to close before the buyer can conduct thorough due diligence.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: If genuine, this property represents a highly lucrative value-add opportunity, offering an incredibly low entry point per square foot in a high-demand rental hub (JVC). The spacious layout and vacant status make it highly attractive for immediate leasing or short-term rental conversion. However, the extreme discount to the market median is a major red flag. An investor must proceed with caution: verify the RERA listing permit (Form A), request a physical viewing, confirm the exact service charge rate, and audit the building's overall maintenance status before proceeding.

title: Unbeatable Value |Meadows 5 |Type 6 | Lake View |
description:
Unbeatable Value |Meadows 5 |Type 6 | Lake View |

Positioned on one of the most sought-after streets in Meadows 5, this spacious Type 6 four-bedroom villa offers a rare combination of scale,

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is located in Meadows 5, a highly sought-after, mature villa community within Emaar's Emirates Living master development. While the listing is categorized under 'Emirates Hills' (which artificially inflates the market median to AED 2,999/sqft), Meadows is a distinct premium sub-community. The Type 6 layout is a highly popular 4-bedroom + family room + study configuration, offering excellent functional space for families and high rental demand.
risk_flags: Area Misclassification: The property is located in 'The Meadows', not 'Emirates Hills'. Comparing it to the Emirates Hills market median of AED 2,999/sqft is misleading, as Meadows market values are historically lower.

BUA vs. Plot Size Discrepancy: The listed 6,113 sqft is highly likely the plot size, not the Built-Up Area (BUA). A standard Type 6 villa has a BUA of approximately 3,578 sqft. If the total price (~AED 11M) is calculated against the actual BUA, the true price per sqft rises to ~AED 3,074, which is actually above the Meadows market average.

High Renovation CapEx: Being marketed as the 'best priced' typically indicates the villa is in its original, dated condition, requiring significant capital expenditure to modernize and compete in the current rental/resale market.
Extension Legality: If the 6,113 sqft is indeed BUA, the villa has been heavily extended. Buyers must verify Dubai Municipality and Emaar approvals/NOCs for these structural modifications.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: While marketed as a heavily discounted deal at AED 1,799/sqft compared to a AED 2,999/sqft median, this is an analytical illusion caused by mixing Meadows property data with Emirates Hills market metrics, and likely substituting plot size for BUA. If the actual BUA is the standard 3,578 sqft, the real price per sqft is ~AED 3,074, which represents a premium. Investors should verify the Title Deed for exact BUA, factor in AED 1.5M+ for renovations if the unit is original, and benchmark the final price against actual Meadows 5 transactional data (typically AED 1,900 to 2,300 per BUA sqft) rather than Emirates Hills averages.

ai_analysis.quality_context: At 1,119 sqft, this 1-bedroom apartment in District 10 is exceptionally large, significantly exceeding the standard 700-900 sqft average for this unit type. While the '02 balconies' and spacious layout are highly desirable, the pricing of AED 769/sqft—standing at a massive 42% discount to the market median of AED 1,324/sqft—strongly indicates an older, lower-tier development. Properties in this price bracket in District 10 typically feature dated finishes, basic amenities, and potentially higher wear-and-tear.
risk_flags: Extreme underpricing relative to the market median (AED 769 vs AED 1,324/sqft) suggests potential structural issues, pending litigation, or substantial unpaid service charges by the current owner.

The 'Rented' status poses a risk under Dubai tenancy laws; if the tenant is paying a legacy rent, the advertised 'High ROI' may be inflated or difficult to optimize due to RERA rent cap restrictions and the 12-month eviction notice requirement.

High service charges: Because service charges in Dubai are calculated on a per-sqft basis, a 1,119 sqft 1-bedroom will incur significantly higher annual maintenance fees than average, which will directly compress the net ROI.
High-pressure broker marketing ('First Come First Reserved') and incomplete description ('UN_FU...') are common indicators of potential bait-and-switch tactics or an outdated listing.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents a classic value-play with a high-risk profile. Buying at AED 769/sqft offers an incredibly low entry point and a significant paper-equity cushion compared to the district median. If the current rental income is verified and yields a strong net ROI after accounting for the high per-sqft service charges, it serves as an excellent cash-flow generator. However, success hinges entirely on rigorous due diligence regarding the building's maintenance history, the seller's financial liabilities, and the exact terms of the active tenancy contract.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Reem Hills, a prestigious and unique gated community on Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi. At 1,285 sqft, this 1-bedroom apartment is exceptionally large—nearly double the size of a standard 1BR in the UAE market. The listing price of AED 1,101 per sqft represents a massive 38.6% discount compared to the market median of AED 1,793 per sqft, signaling a highly undervalued entry point into a premium master development.
risk_flags: High Service Charges: Because service charges are calculated on a per-square-foot basis, a 1,285 sqft 1-bedroom will incur significantly higher annual maintenance fees than a standard 1BR, which will compress net rental yields.
Off-Plan/Construction Risk: Reem Hills is a developing master community; buyers must verify the construction status, developer completion track record (Q Properties), and exact handover timelines.

Pricing Anomaly: A 38% discount to the market median is highly unusual for a premium layout. This could indicate a distressed sale, a less desirable low-floor unit, or a listing price that excludes mandatory developer transfer fees or outstanding payment plan installments.
Regulatory Framework: Note that Al Reem Island is in Abu Dhabi, meaning transaction laws, registration fees, and landlord-tenant laws differ from Dubai's RERA framework.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property is a strong capital appreciation play. Acquiring a premium asset in a gated Al Reem Island community at AED 1,101/sqft offers an immediate equity cushion relative to the AED 1,793 market median. The massive layout is highly attractive to premium tenants or end-users seeking villa-sized space with apartment convenience. However, due to the large square footage, investors must carefully calculate the impact of service charges on net ROI and verify the payment plan structure before committing.

description: SMF Real Estate L.L.C presents this fully furnished 1-bedroom apartment for sale in Al Manara Tower, offering a&nbs

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Al Manara Tower within Jumeirah Village Triangle (JVT) District 4, this 779 sqft 1-bedroom unit offers a larger-than-average footprint compared to newer Dubai handovers. The property benefits from being on a high floor with open views, fully furnished, and crucially 'vacant on transfer'—a highly sought-after status in the current market that commands a premium from end-users and allows investors to immediately lease at current market rates.
risk_flags: The steep discount of ~32% against the market median (963 AED/sqft vs 1,415 AED/sqft) may indicate building-specific maintenance issues, high outstanding service charges, or a highly distressed seller.
Al Manara Tower is an older, mid-tier development; its capital appreciation potential may be limited compared to newer, modern-luxury projects driving the JVT median price upward.
Furnished units require physical inspection to assess the actual depreciation of the fit-outs, as 'premium' descriptions can be subjective.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: At 963 AED/sqft (implied price of ~750,000 AED), this property is a compelling high-yield value play. JVT 1-bedroom apartments currently command rents between 65,000 AED and 75,000 AED, translating to a projected gross rental yield of 8.6% to 10%. The significant discount to the market median provides a strong margin of safety and immediate equity capture, making this an excellent addition for yield-focused portfolios, subject to clean financial and physical due diligence.

title: Largest Layout | Boulevard View | Upgraded
description:
We are pleased to present this upgraded one-bedroom apartment in The Lofts West, Downtown Dubai.

Property Features

- 1 Bedroom
- 2 Bathrooms
- Size 915 sq ft
- Upgraded

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in 'The Lofts West' by Emaar, a highly regarded and established development in Downtown Dubai. At 916 sqft, this unit offers one of the largest 1-bedroom layouts in the sub-market, where typical 1-beds average 750-800 sqft. The 'upgraded' status is a significant value-add for this vintage of Emaar properties, mitigating the typical aesthetic wear-and-tear of older builds. A Boulevard view further enhances its premium positioning, tenant appeal, and liquidity.
risk_flags: The property is priced at AED 2,293/sqft, representing a massive ~32% discount to the Downtown median of AED 3,364/sqft. This steep discount requires strict due diligence to rule out seller distress, structural issues, or unfavorable tenancy contracts (e.g., rented far below market rate with a long-term tenant).
The Lofts is an older development (completed circa 2009/2010). Older towers in Dubai can be subject to higher service charges and potential maintenance issues in common areas.
The quality of the 'upgrade' must be physically verified, as low-grade cosmetic renovations can sometimes mask underlying plumbing or electrical issues.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property presents an exceptional value-add investment opportunity. Acquiring a prime Downtown Dubai asset at a 32% discount to the market median provides an immediate equity buffer and strong capital appreciation potential. Given the oversized layout, upgraded interior, and desirable Boulevard view, this unit is highly suited for the lucrative short-term holiday home market or premium long-term leasing. If secured vacant on transfer, the low entry price per sqft could yield an estimated net ROI of 7.5% to 8.5%, making this a high-conviction buy subject to successful physical and legal due diligence.

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a spacious 481 sqft furnished studio priced at AED 1,143 per sqft, which is approximately 31% below the stated market median of AED 1,659 per sqft. The generous square footage for a studio, combined with its fully furnished status and dedicated parking space, positions it as a highly attractive option for end-users and tenants seeking immediate move-in readiness in a popular suburban hub.
risk_flags: Location Discrepancy: The listing metadata specifies 'Al Barsha South 4', while the description explicitly states 'Location: JVC' and 'Project: Botanica'. These are neighboring but distinct master communities, which requires immediate clarification.

Pricing Anomaly: Selling at a 31% discount to the market median may indicate high motivation from the seller, but it could also signal underlying building maintenance issues, high outstanding service charges, or a misleading/outdated listing price.

Project-Specific Due Diligence: Botanica in JVC is a mid-tier development; investors must verify the quality of building management, historical maintenance of common areas, and the current structure of the service charges which directly impact net yields.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: At an implied purchase price of approximately AED 550,000, this property offers an excellent high-yield opportunity for buy-to-let investors. If the JVC location is confirmed, the area's consistently high occupancy rates and strong rental demand for studios should easily generate gross yields of 8-9%, particularly given the low entry price per sqft. The investment is highly recommended subject to resolving the location discrepancy, verifying the physical condition of the unit, and auditing the building's service charge history.

Here, leisurely days drift into busy nights. Spinning with energy, the outdoors is embraced like the indoors here is not only a self-contained development, but it also provides a cosmopolitan life for residents and visitors alike.

title: SPACIOUS 2BR + STUDY | LARGE BALCONY | MODERN
description:
Step into a refined lifestyle with this spacious 2-bedroom + study apartment at Maravéa Residences by Enzo, located in the heart of Dubai Islands—Dubai’s next-generation waterfront destination. Designed as a boutique development with only 63 residences, the project offers privacy, elegance, and a serene coastal living experience

This well-designed apartment spans approximately 1,221  featuring a generous layout that includes two comfortable bedrooms, a dedicated study room, and a bright open-plan living and dining area. The space flows seamlessly onto a large private balcony, perfect for enjoying peaceful community and park views.

Both bedrooms are thoughtfully designed with built-in wardrobes and en-suite bathrooms, offering comfort and privacy. The additional study provides flexibility as a home office or extra functional space. The modern kitchen is fully fitted with high-quality cabinetry and contemporary finishes, blending style with practicality.

Residents benefit from a full lifestyle offering across multiple levels, including an infinity pool, rooftop lounge, gym, yoga and meditation zones, cinema, co-working spaces, BBQ areas, landscaped gardens, and more

Ideally located, the project is just minutes from Dubai Islands Beach and Mall, 15 minutes to Dubai International Airport and DIFC, and within easy reach of Downtown Dubai

Property Details:
• 2 Bedrooms + Study
• Total Area: approx. 1,221 
• Large Balcony
• Open-plan Living & Dining
• Modern Kitchen & Premium Finishes

Price: AED 2,510,000

Payment Plan: 50/50
• 50% during construction
• 50% on handover

Handover: Q4 2028

An excellent opportunity for both end-users and investors seeking space, functionality, and long-term value in a fast-growing waterfront community.

Interested in this unit or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore investment opportunities in Maravéa Residences.

title: Investor Deal | Luxury 1BR Waterfront Living
description:
Presented by Betterhomes
, this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in Marina Views at Rashid Yachts & Marina offers a rare opportunity to own a premium waterfront residence

Spanning 742.38 sq.ft, the apartment is thoughtfully designed with contemporary interiors, spacious living areas, and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light and create a seamless connection to the vibrant marina surroundings. The modern layout combines comfort and sophistication, making it ideal for both investors and end users seeking long-term value in a prestigious community.

Marina Views forms part of the iconic Rashid Yachts & Marina master development, where Riviera-inspired elegance meets Dubai’s dynamic urban lifestyle. Set within the historic Port Rashid district, the community is designed around a world-class marina capable of accommodating luxury yachts, alongside beautifully landscaped promenades, fine dining, boutique retail, and exclusive leisure experiences.

Residents will enjoy a wide range of premium amenities including swimming pools, fitness facilities, waterfront relaxation areas, and easy access to Dubai’s key landmarks. Perfectly positioned, the development offers excellent connectivity with Downtown Dubai just 10 minutes away and Dubai International Airport reachable within 15 minutes.

The amenities include a community pool and gym. There is also a range of supermarkets, cafes, restaurants, pharmacys beside the building.

Please call today for more information about this property or to arrange a viewing.

Location and Connectivity:

Binghatti Apex is situated within Jumeirah Village Circle, one of Dubai's most sought-after family-friendly communities developed by Nakheel. The community boasts over 30 landscaped parks, cycling and jogging paths, supermarkets including Spinneys and Choithrams, healthcare facilities, and Circle Mall  a full-scale retail and dining destination. Schools, nurseries, and cafes are embedded throughout the neighbourhood, making everyday living effortlessly convenient.

Strategically positioned between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, JVC offers excellent connectivity across Dubai. Dubai Marina, Business Bay, and Palm Jumeirah are all easily accessible, while the Mall of the Emirates metro station provides a public transport link to the wider city.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Hunter Steele Newman.

title: Vacant Now | Maids Room | Vastu | 2 En-suite Bath
description:
This beautifully maintained 2-bedroom apartment in the highly sought-after Goldcrest Views 1 is now vacant and ready to move in immediately. Perfectly positioned in the heart of Jumeirah Lakes Towers, this home offers a fantastic balance of comfort, functionality, and modern living.

•	Vacant Now
•	Vastu Compliant
•	Maids Room with Shower
•	2 En-Suite Bedrooms
•	Open plan Kitchen Living Area
•	Access to balcony from all rooms
•	High Floor
•	Park / Community Views
•	1 Covered Parking

The apartment features two generous en-suite bedrooms, both with direct access to balconies, allowing you to enjoy beautiful views and fresh air from every room. A dedicated maid’s room adds excellent practicality for family or professional living. The thoughtfully designed open kitchen flows seamlessly into the living and dining area, creating a bright and sociable space ideal for entertaining or everyday family life. The entire layout is Vastu compliant, promoting positive energy and harmony throughout the home.

With balconies accessible from all rooms, you’ll love the sense of openness and connection to the outdoors. Goldcrest Views 1 offers residents premium facilities and a prime location with easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road, metro stations, lakeside promenades, and an abundance of restaurants, supermarkets, and amenities.

This is a rare opportunity to own a well-planned, move-in ready home in one of JLT’s most popular towers.
Interested in viewing? Contact me today to schedule a private tour.

Armada Tower 3 is situated in the lively JLT conveniently placed within close proximity of key landmarks in Dubai such as Dubai Marina, The Palm and JBR Beach. JLT offers a range of benefits to residents such as a wide range of restaurants, transport links and directly off Sheikh Zayed Road. Also a high-rise building in Jumeirah Lake Towers, a mixed-use development best known for its beautiful man-made lakes and manicured gardens. The residential building is a part of the Armada Towers complex and is located in Cluster P, JLT.

Tower 3 developed by Armada Group has 36 floors above ground and three floors below ground along with retail options on the ground level. The residential building stands 493 sq. ft. tall. The high-rise is designed by Adnan Saffarini. Its construction started in 2005 and was completed in 2009.

description:
Betterhomes is delighted to present this spacious one-bedroom apartment in Green Lakes 2, one of the most sought-after residential towers in Jumeirah Lake Towers (JLT). Offering a high-floor position, stunning Marina skyline views, and direct Metro access, this property is ideal for both end users and investors.

The apartment features a well-designed layout with generous living spaces, elegant wood flooring, and large windows that fill the home with natural light. A private balcony provides the perfect space to relax while enjoying panoramic city views. The spacious bedroom offers comfort and practicality, while the overall layout maximizes functionality and everyday living.

Property Features:

High Floor
Exclusive Listing
Spacious Layout
Marina Skyline Views
Wood Flooring
Private Balcony
Direct Access to Metro
Excellent Building Facilities

Residents benefit from premium amenities including a swimming pool, fully equipped gymnasium, children's play areas, 24-hour security, and covered parking.

Located in the heart of Jumeirah Lake Towers, Green Lakes is widely regarded as one of the community's premier residential developments. JLT offers a vibrant lifestyle with scenic lakes, landscaped parks, retail outlets, restaurants, cafés, and excellent connectivity to Dubai Marina, Sheikh Zayed Road, and key business districts.

This is a fantastic opportunity to secure a quality home in one of Dubai's most established waterfront communities.

title: Lowest Price  | Close to Metro | Smart Investment
raw_area: Building 157, Mogul Cluster, Discovery Gardens, Dubai
description:
Arabian Acres Real Estate is proud to offer this 2 Bedroom Apartment for sale in Discovery Garden, Jabal Ali First. 

Property Highlights:
-Size:  1587 sq ft
-Bedrooms: 2
-Bathrooms: 3

-Developed by Nakheel Properties
-Garden-themed residential clusters
-One of Dubai best places for walking
-A freehold community
-Offers apartments in studio, 1 and 2-bed layouts
-A family-friendly and affordable neighbourhood
-In proximity to Ibn Battuta Mall
-Quick access to the main roads in the city
-Home to Discovery Gardens Metro Station on Route 2020

Building Amenities:
-Fully equipped gym
-Adult and children’s swimming pools
-Manicured gardens with walking trails
-Children’s play area
-24/7 security and concierge services
-High-speed elevators
-Easy access to metro and bus routes
-Location Benefits

Discovery Gardens is a perfect community for singles and families looking for an affordable, green, and pedestrian-friendly neighborhood in Dubai.
Situated close to Ibn Battuta Mall, the area provides a self-sufficient lifestyle with convenient access to supermarkets, petrol stations, restaurants, and laundry facilities.
Developed by Nakheel in 2009, Discovery Gardens is known for its lively low-rise apartment buildings and extensive green spaces, ideal for walking and outdoor activities.
Residents can also take advantage of community swimming pools and tennis courts. The neighborhood mainly attracts mid-income South Asian families and corporate professionals.
Nestled in vibrant Jebel Ali, Discovery Gardens offers seamless connectivity via Sheikh Zayed Road and E311, plus its own metro station. You’re just minutes from:
-Ibn Battuta Mall (5 min)
-Dubai Marina (10 min)
-Downtown Dubai (25 min)

At Arabian Acres Real Estate, our team is dedicated to delivering a positive experience for our clients, ensuring they value their past interactions, receive the support they need, and are set up for a successful future..

description:
Better Homes is Delighted to offer this Great Investment opportunity

 Discover stylish waterfront living in this well-maintained 1-bedroom apartment in the sought-after Lake Terrace Tower, perfectly positioned in the vibrant community of Jumeirah Lake Towers.

This bright and spacious unit features a modern open-plan living and dining area, enhanced by large windows that showcase beautiful full lake views and fill the space with natural light. The layout is both practical and comfortable, ideal for end-users and investors alike.

The semi-open kitchen is fitted with quality cabinetry and ample storage, while the bedroom offers built-in wardrobes and a cozy yet spacious feel. The apartment also includes a well-appointed bathroom and a private balcony—perfect for enjoying serene lake views.

title: Perfect Investment | High Floor | Vacant
description:
Betterhomes is pleased to offer you this stunning One Bedroom apartment located in the Marina Gate Tower 2 by Select Group, Dubai Marina. 

Perfectly positioned at the entrance of Dubai Marina, Marina Gate 2 offers direct access to Marina Walk, and is just minutes from the Metro, Tram, restaurants, cafés, and shops. This is modern waterfront living at its best. 

This one bedroom comes with fitted kitchen appliances, is bright and spacious and it is finished to a very high standard. The apartment has 2 bathrooms, separate laundry area and storage space. There is a balcony from the living room and there are floor to ceiling windows. The apartment is located on a high floor and is overlooking the community. The apartment is vacant and is an ideal option for end users and investors. 

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including two infinity pools, two state-of-the-art gyms, padel and squash courts, basketball/football courts, and the exclusive Amara Lounge. Marina Gate also features the luxurious Jumeirah Living Hotel offering premium services and facilities. 

Property Features:
- Spacious Balcony
- Fully fitted Kitchen
- Laundry Room & Storage Space
- Allotted Covered Parking Space
- 24 hours Concierge
- Infinity pools & Hi-Tech Gymnasium
- Basketball Court & Paddle Court
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing. 

Finance is available on this property through Betterhomes Mortgage partners.

description:
Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Ideally located along Marina Walk, Sparkle Towers offers easy access to the beach, Dubai Metro, and a variety of waterfront dining and leisure destinations.

raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 2, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Soulever by Beyond stands as the new landmark of Dubai Maritime City, where the energy of the skyline meets the calm of the sea. Developed by Beyond Developments under the Omniyat Group, this project redefines coastal sophistication with architecture inspired by the sails of Dubai’s maritime heritage. Every line, texture, and detail reflects elegance, light, and a seamless connection to nature.

This 3-bedroom residence spans 1,818  and offers a breathtaking combination of Ocean Cove and Forest views. The spacious layout features an open-plan living and dining area flowing onto a sunlit balcony, a maid’s room, and a powder room. Designed with precision and balance, the interiors combine natural materials, warm neutral tones, and floor-to-ceiling windows that invite light and sea breezes throughout the home.
Soulever residents experience a lifestyle unlike any other, with amenities crafted for well-being and leisure. Enjoy a heated infinity pool overlooking the sea, a state-of-the-art gym, yoga and meditation spaces, a luxurious spa, and a serene residents lounge. The podium park, children’s play areas, event space, library, and tree-lined retail avenues bring every comfort and convenience right to your doorstep.

Located just five minutes from Mina Rashid and ten minutes from Jumeirah Beach, Soulever offers an ideal blend of privacy and connection. Its setting within Dubai Maritime City places it moments from Downtown Dubai and DIFC while keeping the sea as your constant backdrop.
Price: AED 7,575,000
Size: 1,818 
View: Ocean Cove / Forest
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

Interested in this 3-bedroom residence or wish to explore other Soulever units? Contact us today to discover a new standard of luxury waterfront living in Dubai Maritime City.

description:
Fully furnished and currently rented, this 2-bedroom apartment in Tenora presents an excellent investment opportunity with immediate rental income and strong long-term appreciation potential within one of Dubai’s fastest-growing master communities.

Located in the heart of Dubai South, the property benefits from ongoing infrastructure development and increasing demand driven by the expansion of Al Maktoum International Airport, Expo City Dubai, and the wider commercial and logistics hub surrounding the area. As the community continues to mature, Dubai South is expected to see significant capital growth, making this an ideal addition to any investment portfolio.
The apartment offers a practical open-plan layout with bright living spaces, modern finishes, floor-to-ceiling windows, and a fitted kitchen. The unit is fully furnished and well suited to both end users and long-term tenants.

title: 40% POST HANDOVER PP | BEACHFRONT | ULTRA LUXURY
raw_area: Treppan Serenique Residences, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Discover an elevated lifestyle in this elegant 2-bedroom residence at Treppan Serenique, nestled within the prestigious Dubai Islands. With its serene coastal setting and refined architectural design, this residence offers an exceptional blend of comfort, privacy, and sophistication — ideal for both end-users and savvy investors seeking long-term value.

Spanning 989.17 , the apartment welcomes you into a spacious open-plan layout where contemporary design meets thoughtful functionality. The sunlit living and dining area flows seamlessly into a sleek modern kitchen, fully fitted with premium appliances and high-end finishes. Floor-to-ceiling glass doors lead to your private balcony, where you can unwind while taking in soothing sea views — a daily reminder that you’ve arrived somewhere special.

Both bedrooms are generously sized, with full-height wardrobes and carefully curated finishes that reflect Treppan’s commitment to luxury living. The master suite features its own tranquil outlook and access to a modern bathroom, while the secondary bedroom is ideal for guests, family, or a private study. 

As part of Treppan Serenique, residents enjoy access to a curated collection of resort-style amenities:

 Infinity pool overlooking the Arabian Gulf State-of-the-art gym and wellness center Concierge and valet services Private beach access Kids’ play area 24/7 security and smart access controls 
Located within the vibrant Marina District of Dubai Islands, the community is designed for waterfront living with direct access to upcoming luxury hotels, retail promenades, and cultural attractions — all just minutes from Downtown Dubai and DXB International Airport.

Price: AED 2,853,000

Interested in this 2-bedroom residence or want to explore more options? Get in touch today to discover refined coastal living at Treppan Serenique, Dubai Islands.

title: PRIVATE BEACH | WATERFRONT LIVING | 50/50 PP
raw_area: Hado by Beyond Tower B, Hado by Beyond, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Introducing a rare opportunity to own a premium waterfront residence at HADO by Beyond, offering exceptional value within the prestigious Dubai Islands.

This beautifully designed 2-bedroom apartment spans 1,236 sq ft and delivers a perfect balance of space, natural light, and everyday comfort. The open-plan living and dining area is enhanced by floor-to-ceiling windows, capturing serene sea and villa community views and creating a bright, tranquil atmosphere. Both bedrooms are generously sized, ensuring privacy and relaxation, while a dedicated laundry room adds practical convenience to the home.

HADO is a thoughtfully curated, design-led waterfront development inspired by Japanese principles of harmony, balance, and simplicity. The interiors feature refined natural materials, soft neutral palettes, and clean architectural lines, resulting in a timeless and sophisticated coastal living experience.

Residents enjoy access to a comprehensive suite of resort-style amenities, including landscaped zen gardens, swimming pools, a fully equipped fitness studio, yoga and wellness spa, children’s play areas, social lounges, and curated retail spaces — all surrounded by lush greenery and just moments from the beach.

The project offers a highly attractive and investor-friendly 50/50 payment plan:

10% on booking

10% one month from booking

30% during construction

50% on completion

Handover is scheduled for Q3 2029, providing flexibility and strong long-term growth potential.

Strategically positioned on Dubai Islands, HADO ensures seamless connectivity to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Dubai International Airport, while preserving the exclusivity and tranquility of island living.

Price: AED 3,911,000
Size: 1,236 sq ft
View: Sea & Villa Community

With limited availability of 2-bedroom units at this price point, this represents one of the best-value offerings in a landmark waterfront development. Enquire today to secure this exceptional residence.

title: Stunning Beachfront Apartment on Palm Jumeirah
raw_area: Orla by Omniyat, The Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
This spectacular four bedroom apartment is positioned within the highly prestigious Orla by Omniyat — managed by Dorchester Collection — on the Palm’s Crescent.

Crafted by Foster + Partners with a vision to establish a strong and seamless connection between the indoors and outdoors, it spans 8,010 sq.ft. and presents exceptionally tasteful interiors.

The living area comes as the apartment’s social and entertainment core. Double-height ceilings enhance the sense of scale and light, with the full-height glazing framing framing views of the Palm and the Arabian sea. Just outside, a vast balcony offers the perfect al fresco space with unbeatable vistas and the comfort of a private swimming pool.

Sleek and well-appointed with top-tier European appliances, the show kitchen is supported by a closed preparation kitchen — making for an elaborate culinary setup. Each bedroom is ensuite, and served by generous balconies.

The home also benefits from a maid’s room, an office, and four parking spaces, alongside Orla’s world-class facilities. Stationed minutes from Atlantis the Palm and Atlantis The Royal, its setting places prime lifestyle, entertainment and dining destinations at the doorstep.

Palm Jumeirah stands as an iconic address worldwide. Well connected to Dubai’s key thoroughfares, it places coveted destinations including The View at The Palm, Palm West Beach, Club Vista Mare, and Palm Jumeirah Mall at a convenient distance.

Reach out to us to know more about this exquisite home.

description:
MIRA PRESENTS:
The Royal Atlantis Resort and Residences At Palm Jumeirah

The Royal Atlantis Residences is a prestigious luxury development located on Palm Jumeirah in Dubai, offering an array of amenities for contemporary 2-bedroom apartments. Here are some of the amenities you can expect:

- Stunning Views of the Arabian Gulf and Dubai skyline.
- Modern and Stylish Interior Design with high-end finishes.
- Private Balcony or Terrace for outdoor living.
- Infinity pools.
- State-of-the-art Fitness Center with personal trainers.
- Spa and Wellness Centers for relaxation.
- On-site Restaurants and Cafes offering various cuisines.
- Professional Concierge Services for residents.
- Smart Home Technology for convenience and security.
- Covered Parking for residents convenience.
- Panoramic Elevators for stunning views.

Address JBR is a luxury beachfront residence with stunning views of the iconic Bluewaters Island and Jumeirah Beach. In addition to being a 5-star hotel with 77 floors, The Address Jumeirah is home to some of the best restaurants in Dubai, including Al Qasr Lounge & Bar and The Shore Grill Steakhouse. The hotel has an impressive infinity swimming pool that has been verified by Guinness World Records as the highest in the world. This is the perfect choice to consider as a primary residence or winter getaway.	
		
Jumeirah Beach Residence is in the heart of one of Dubai’s most dynamic and lively urban locations. It's situated close to the city’s thriving business hubs, an evocative beachfront resort for good dining, major attractions, Panoramic views, and entertainment facilities.

raw_area: Atlantis The Royal Residences, The Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
Turnkey Coastal Serenity with Sunset Views!    
      
Luxury Residences—Dubai’s leading resale and rental agency for Atlantis The Royal Residences and part of the original development sales team—presents this exceptional turnkey home within the new icon of Dubai.    
      
Perfectly positioned to capture golden sunsets, this private residence boasts uninterrupted views across the Arabian Gulf and exquisitely landscaped gardens. Every element has been thoughtfully curated and meticulously enhanced by its current owner to elevate comfort, sophistication, and modern functionality. 
 
Residents of Atlantis The Royal enjoy exclusive Black Tier membership privileges such as 30% discount level to the resort restaurants and spa treatments, and effortless access to world-class amenities, including Michelin-starred dining by global icons, private beach, indoor and outdoor pools, spa and wellness garden, sauna and steam rooms, tennis court, elegant library, resident lounges, business suites, BBQ area with outdoor kitchen, and a state-of-the-art Technogym fitness centre.

The experience is complemented by valet parking, 24-hour concierge services, and a level of discretion and attention to detail found only in the world’s finest 5* branded residences.

Arrange your private viewing today and experience the very definition of coastal elegance and refined living at Atlantis The Royal Residences.
